pageContext.name: Sirius Black with Wormtail
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Sirius Black with Wormtail Figurine!  Standing at 8.75' tall, the Azkaban escapee is seen holding Wormtail at his mighty wand's point, ready to dig in for some information.   Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Harry Potter collection today!
